No Poverty.reason: The reinterpretation of post-war economic development policies (Target 1.b) implies analysis of their impact on poverty, even if not explicitly stated.
evidence: 戰後台灣經濟發展的再詮釋

Zero Hunger.reason: The course's focus on 'Agricultural Taiwan, Industrial Japan' directly relates to historical agricultural productivity and food systems, impacting hunger (Target 2.3).
evidence: 日治時期台灣經濟發展與「農業台灣 ‧ 工業日本」

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or inferable content in the syllabus relates to health, disease, or well-being targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and analyzes historical education policies like '皇民化' (Japanization), relevant to cultural understanding and sustainable development (Target 4.7). It also fosters critical thinking.
